creator: ashafer@badland.io
text:
(In reply to Lapo Luchini from comment #5)

I'm working on other things now and don't have plans to return atm. Did this patch work for you?

Your photoprism port looks really cool, does it reliably build tensorflow? If so, it's in better shape than my patch. It would be interesting to compare the two, assuming it works maybe your tensorflow build could be incorporated into or replace this.
